summary: Armenia search interest elevated at 68 (3m scale) on Feb 17 due to historic JD Vance visit Feb 9-11. Mean-reversion target ~55. Resolution rescaling makes "no change" band very narrow (raw 65-70). Decreases is most likely outcome.
content: Key data: Feb 17 = 68 in 3-month scale, peak in resolution range = 79 (Feb 10, Vance visit). Rescaled Feb 17 ≈ 86. Mean reversion target ≈ 55. "No change" requires raw 65-70 (very narrow). Monte Carlo: AR(1) gives 89% decrease, bootstrap gives 42% decrease. Blended ~60% decrease, 30% increase, 10% no change.
